ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chromatographic_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the run */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chromatographic method used */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the run was performed */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the run */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the run */,
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration data associated with the run */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample used for the run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "run_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromatographic_runs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromatographic_runs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromatographic_runs_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromatographic_runs_calibration_id FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_id") REFERENCES calibrations ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromatographic_runs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters and conditions used in the method (stored as JSON) */,
  "column_type" TEXT /* Type of column used in the method */,
  "mobile_phase" TEXT /* Mobile phase used in the method */,
  "flow_rate" REAL /* Flow rate of the mobile phase */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Column temperature */,
  "detector" TEXT /* Detector used in the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., researcher, analyst, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name or model of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the instrument is installed */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., HPLC, GC, MS) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., standard, unknown, QC) */,
  "sample_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sample */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "standard_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the standard used for calibration */,
  "calibration_curve" TEXT /* Calibration curve data (e.g., linear equation) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the calibration */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration (e.g., external standard, internal standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peaks" (
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peak */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run where the peak was detected */,
  "peak_name" TEXT /* Name of the peak (e.g., F, P2, Unknown) */,
  "calibrated_area_percent" REAL /* Calibrated area percentage of the peak */,
  "area_percent" REAL /* Area percentage of the peak */,
  "retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the peak in minutes */,
  "peak_area" REAL /* Area of the peak */,
  "peak_width" REAL /* Width of the peak */,
  "peak_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the peak (e.g., symmetrical, asymmetrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peaks_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES chromatographic_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peak_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peak_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak being assigned */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the peak is assigned to */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who assigned the category */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the assignment (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peak_assignments_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peaks ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peak_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES peak_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES chromatographic_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "file_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES chromatographic_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES chromatographic_runs ("run_id")
)
